## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat(scope): subject`)
- [ ] Changes are focused — one purpose per PR
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys included
- [ ] Documentation updated (if API or behavior changed)
- [ ] All CI checks pass
